homePage.title: Support that feels as dialed-in as the rest of your bag.
homePage.lead: Find answers quickly, check shipping and returns, submit a support request, or track your latest order without digging through a generic help center.
homePage.aside1Body: Need help deciding between two clubs, shoe sizes, or layering pieces?
homePage.aside2Body: Shipping timing, tracking guidance, and damaged-delivery follow-up.
homePage.aside3Body: Clear policy guidance before you start the process.
homePage.jumpTitle: Jump straight to the right path
homePage.jumpLead: The support menu is broad, so this page acts like a caddie. Pick the lane that matches your question and keep moving.
homePage.card1Body: Share a message and get a reference number back immediately.
homePage.card2Body: Quick answers for buying advice, shipping, returns, and account questions.
homePage.card3Body: Use your order number and checkout email to see the latest status.
homePage.card4Body: Shipping, returns, privacy, terms, and cookies all in one section.
homePage.stat1Body: Typical first-response goal for new support requests
homePage.stat2Body: Standard window for most unused returns
homePage.stat3Body: Standard shipping threshold on qualifying orders
homePage.faqLead: These come from the backend support FAQ feed, so the hub can stay current without rewriting the page.

contactPage.title: Reach the support desk without waiting in the dark.
contactPage.lead: Tell us what happened, add an order number if you have one, and we will create a tracked support request right away.
contactPage.formLead: This form is connected to the backend and stores requests in PostgreSQL when the database is enabled.
contactPage.name: Full name
contactPage.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what happened, what you need, and any deadline we should know about.
contactPage.successBody: We logged your request under {{topic}}. Keep that reference number handy if you follow up.
contactPage.info1Body: Our goal is a first human reply within 1 business day.
contactPage.info2Body: Include the order number, product name, and what outcome you want.
contactPage.info3Body: For policy questions, check FAQs, shipping, returns, and size guide pages first.

faqPage.title: The short answers people actually need.
faqPage.lead: Browse common questions across buying advice, shipping, returns, sizing, and support workflows.
faqPage.asideBody: These questions are served from the backend so the support team can keep one source of truth.

shippingPage.title: Clear delivery expectations before you check out.
shippingPage.lead: Our shipping guidance is written for real shopping decisions: when items move, what changes delivery timing, and when to contact support.
shippingPage.card1Body: Most orders are processed within 1 business day before carrier handoff.
shippingPage.card2Body: Tracking appears after the label is generated and updates as the package moves.
shippingPage.card3Body: Launch weeks, holiday periods, and weather events can add a short delay.
shippingPage.point1: You have no tracking update 24 hours after order confirmation.
shippingPage.point2: A delivery attempt happened but the carrier details are unclear.
shippingPage.point3: Your package arrived damaged or incomplete.
shippingPage.point4: You need to confirm a shipping change before dispatch.

returnsPage.title: A return policy built to reduce surprises.
returnsPage.lead: If a product is not right, we want the next step to feel straightforward. This page explains timing, condition expectations, and the cleanest path to an exchange.
returnsPage.asideBody: Most unused items may be returned within 30 days. Personalized products and clearly used items may not qualify.
returnsPage.card1Body: Unused clubs, balls, bags, apparel, footwear, and accessories in original condition.
returnsPage.card2Body: Custom builds, personalized goods, and items with clear signs of use or wear.
returnsPage.step1: Review your order and product condition before starting the request.
returnsPage.step2: Send support a short note with order number, item, and preferred resolution.
returnsPage.step3: Wait for confirmation before shipping anything back if the item is damaged.
returnsPage.step4: Once inspected, approved refunds go back to the original payment method.

sizeGuidePage.title: Use fit guidance that makes sense for golf, not just streetwear.
sizeGuidePage.lead: Golf gear has its own movement needs. These notes help you pick sizes for shoes, layers, gloves, and course-ready apparel with fewer returns.
sizeGuidePage.asideBody: Prioritize shoulder mobility, rotation room, and stable foot lockdown over a fashion-only fit.
sizeGuidePage.checksTitle: Quick fit checks before you keep it
sizeGuidePage.check1Body: You should be able to rotate fully without shoulder pull or waistband restriction.
sizeGuidePage.check2Body: Shoes should hold the heel securely without toe pressure on downhill steps.
sizeGuidePage.check3Body: Gloves should feel second-skin close with no bunching in the palm.

sizeRows.shoesNote: Choose wide if you want extra toe room.
sizeRows.polosNote: Size up for a relaxed clubhouse fit.
sizeRows.pantsNote: Waist is true; inseam runs slightly clean.
sizeRows.shortsNote: Best for on-course range of motion.
sizeRows.glovesNote: Leather should feel close without bunching.

trackPage.title: Check your order status with the same email you used at checkout.
trackPage.lead: Enter the order number and checkout email to see the latest status, destination summary, and line items.
trackPage.asideBody: Use the exact order email to avoid false mismatches. If your order is brand new, allow a little time for processing.
trackPage.empty: Your order summary will appear here after a successful lookup.

supportPage.policyAsideBody: These pages are written to be readable first. If you need a specific clarification, send a support request and include the policy name.

privacyPage.title: What we collect, why we collect it, and how we use it.
privacyPage.lead: GreenLinks uses account, order, and browsing data to run the store, support customers, and improve the buying experience.
privacyPage.section1Body: We collect the details you provide at signup, checkout, support contact, and newsletter opt-in. We also collect order activity, wishlist data, and basic usage information needed to keep the storefront and support flows working.
privacyPage.section2Body: We use data to fulfill orders, respond to support requests, personalize your account experience, prevent abuse, and understand which parts of the storefront need improvement.
privacyPage.section3Body: Support request information may be stored so we can follow up, investigate issues, and keep a record of what was resolved. If you have a privacy-specific request, contact support and note that it is a privacy inquiry.

termsPage.title: Ground rules for using the storefront and placing orders.
termsPage.lead: These terms explain the expectations around account use, pricing, order handling, and product information on GreenLinks.
termsPage.section1Body: Please use the site lawfully, keep account details accurate, and avoid activity that interferes with checkout, support systems, or the experience of other shoppers.
termsPage.section2Body: We work to keep product details, prices, and availability accurate, but inventory and promotional details can change. If something material needs correction after checkout, support will contact you before final resolution.
termsPage.section3Body: Submitting an order means you authorize payment and provide accurate contact and delivery details. Support decisions on issues like damage claims or misuse may require order evidence, photos, or additional verification.

cookiesPage.title: How cookies and local storage help the store function.
cookiesPage.lead: GreenLinks uses a small set of browser storage tools to remember language, cart state, wishlist data, and other quality-of-life settings.
cookiesPage.section1Body: Some browser storage is used to keep your cart, language, authentication state, and key storefront features working as you move through the site.
cookiesPage.section2Body: We also use local storage for convenience features like remembered language choice, AI history, hidden chat state, and similar session helpers that make the app feel continuous.
cookiesPage.section3Body: You can clear cookies or local storage in your browser settings, but doing so may reset parts of your experience such as cart contents, saved preferences, and support UI state.
